The current visit record indicates the presence of "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia" as a diagnosis. This is a clear indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this diagnosis is explicitly mentioned, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit.
